description_long: This house features a rustic, medieval-inspired design with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in weathered shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from timber framing with infill panels and a stone foundation, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The front includes a covered porch supported by wooden posts, with a hanging lantern and a small bench or stool nearby. Windows are small, rectangular, and arranged in pairs, featuring lattice panes and wooden frames. The main entryway is marked by a wooden door with decorative trim and a stone accent above it. The overall structure is compact, single-story, and evokes the look of a countryside or village dwelling.
description: A rustic, timber-framed house with a steep gable roof, stone foundation, and a covered porch. Small lattice windows and a wooden entryway add to its medieval village charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main door with decorative trim, hanging lantern, and a small bench or stool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the porch, the gable roof, and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, uninterrupted stone foundation and a row of small, paired windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the end wall with timber framing and the side of the porch structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with decorative trim, covered porch supported by posts, hanging lantern, and stone accent above the entry.
